Children's Hospital Los Angeles
prices.

📍 Los Angeles, CA CHLA

Cash-pay and insurance prices for 27 procedures at Children's Hospital Los Angeles, pulled from the federally-mandated machine-readable file the hospital is required to publish. Cash-pay range across these procedures: $15 to $904.

Procedure prices.

  • Abdominal ultrasound, complete CPT 76700 $18
  • Brain MRI with and without contrast CPT 70553 $904
  • Brain MRI without contrast CPT 70551 $478
  • Carotid duplex ultrasound CPT 93880 $48
  • Cataract surgery, one eye CPT 66984 no cash price published
  • Colonoscopy with polyp removal CPT 45385 no cash price published
  • Colonoscopy, diagnostic CPT 45378 no cash price published
  • CT abdomen and pelvis with contrast CPT 74177 $278
  • Echocardiogram, complete with Doppler CPT 93306 $859
  • Hemoglobin A1c CPT 83036 no cash price published
  • Inguinal hernia repair, open CPT 49505 no cash price published
  • Knee arthroscopy with meniscectomy CPT 29881 no cash price published
  • Knee/lower-extremity MRI without contrast CPT 73721 $182
  • Laparoscopic cholecystectomy CPT 47562 no cash price published
  • Lipid panel CPT 80061 $15
  • Lumbar epidural steroid injection CPT 64483 $624
  • Lumbar spine MRI without contrast CPT 72148 $478

  • New patient office visit, level 4 CPT 99204 $20 to $37

  • Office visit, established patient, level 4 CPT 99214 $20
  • Psychotherapy, 45 minutes CPT 90834 $90
  • Septoplasty (deviated septum repair) CPT 30520 no cash price published
  • Thyroid ultrasound CPT 76536 $308
  • TSH (thyroid stimulating hormone) CPT 84443 $52

Open the comparison →

About this data.

The prices above are pulled directly from Children's Hospital Los Angeles's machine-readable file (MRF), required under the Hospital Price Transparency Rule (45 CFR 180.50). We download the file, parse the rows for our shoppable CPT set, and publish the dollar amounts as the hospital published them. No surveys, no estimates.

Cash-pay rates are what an uninsured patient would be charged. Insurance-negotiated rates vary by payer and plan; pick a payer in the comparison tool to see plan-specific numbers.

Data sources: CMS Hospital Price Transparency rule (45 CFR 180.50). CMS Hospital Care Compare (xubh-q36u). Last refresh: 2026-04-27.
A consumer reading of CMS-mandated MRF data. Not medical or financial advice. Itemized · itemized.health
